$comment:
SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Copyright (c) 2026 NVIDIA CORPORATION & AFFILIATES. All rights reserved.
SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
name: nemoclaw
description: NemoClaw — run OpenClaw inside OpenShell with NVIDIA inference

scripts.format:ts: cd nemoclaw && npm run lint:fix && npm run format
scripts.build:cli: tsc -p tsconfig.src.json && node dist/lib/cli/generate-oclif-metadata-manifest.js && if find nemoclaw-blueprint/scripts -name '*.ts' -print -quit | grep -q .; then tsc -p nemoclaw-blueprint/tsconfig.json; fi
scripts.docs:strict: npm run docs:check-agent-variants && FERN_VERSION=$(node -p "require('./fern/fern.config.json').version") && cd fern && npx --yes "fern-api@${FERN_VERSION}" check
scripts.docs:live: FERN_VERSION=$(node -p "require('./fern/fern.config.json').version") && cd fern && npx --yes "fern-api@${FERN_VERSION}" docs dev
scripts.prepare: if command -v tsc >/dev/null 2>&1 || [ -x node_modules/.bin/tsc ]; then npm run build:cli; fi && (npm install --omit=dev --ignore-scripts 2>/dev/null || true) && if [ -d .git ]; then bash scripts/npm-link-or-shim.sh; if command -v prek >/dev/null 2>&1; then prek install; else echo "Skipping git hook setup (prek not installed)"; fi; fi
scripts.prepublishOnly: git describe --tags --match 'v*' | sed 's/^v//' > .version && test -s .version && cd nemoclaw && env -u npm_config_global -u npm_config_prefix -u npm_config_omit npm install --ignore-scripts && ./node_modules/.bin/tsc
